basic_01_inventory_cash.reason: Inventories — merchandise = Inventories; Cash and cash equivalents = Cash; amounts exact

basic_02_inventory_on_account.reason: Extra HST ITC debit line (Tax assets $39) added; Trade payables inflated to $339 vs expected $300. Core entry correct; differences are tax-only

basic_03_issue_stock_with_apic.reason: Issued capital = Share capital—Common; Share premium = APIC; amounts exact

basic_04_sell_inventory.reason: Cost of sales = COGS; Revenue from sale of goods = Revenue; 4-line entry exact

basic_06_refinance_loan.reason: Long-term borrowings = Notes payable; same-account debit/credit exact

basic_07_loan_to_equity.reason: Short-term borrowings = Notes payable; Issued capital = Share capital—Common; amounts exact

basic_08_deliver_service_against_deposit.reason: Contract liabilities exact; Revenue from rendering of services = Revenue; amounts exact

basic_10_declare_dividend.reason: Retained earnings / Dividends payable — exact; correctly uses Retained earnings not Dividends declared

basic_11_convert_preferred_to_common.reason: Issued capital — preferred/common shares = Share capital—Preferred/Common; amounts exact

basic_12_pay_salaries.reason: Employee benefits expense (IAS 19) = Salaries expense; Cash exact

basic_13_accrue_utility.reason: Utilities expense / Accrued liabilities — exact match

basic_15_no_entry.reason: journal_entry is non-null object with empty lines instead of expected null; not a tax-only difference

int_03_machinery_purchase.reason: PP&E Machinery / Trade payables / Cash — exact match with minor account name variants

int_05_bond_issuance_discount.reason: Cash $2,657,516.24 vs expected $2,657,510 — $6.24 outside +/-1 PV rounding tolerance; Discount correspondingly off

int_06_warranty_provision.reason: Warranty provisions = Provision for warranties; Warranty expense exact

int_07_decommissioning_provision.reason: PP&E / Trade payables / Decommissioning provision — amounts exact

int_08_share_repurchase_cancel.reason: Issued capital = Share capital; Retained earnings $10,000 correct; Cash $60,000 exact

int_09_merchandise_with_costs.reason: Inventories / Warehousing expense / Transportation expense (= Distribution costs) / Trade payables / Cash — amounts exact

int_11_land_instalment_discount.reason: Land $49,173,243 vs expected $49,173,000 — $243 outside +/-1 PV rounding; Discount correspondingly off

int_12_site_improvements.reason: Single Cr Cash $4,110,000 instead of two separate lines: Cash $1,750,000 + Cash—chequing $2,360,000; merge_lines collapsed distinct payment methods

int_13_donation_note.reason: Donations expense / Notes payable — exact match

int_14_vehicle_mixed_payment.reason: PP&E Vehicles / Cash / Short-term borrowings (= Notes payable for 2-month note) — exact

int_17_customer_deposit.reason: Dr Cash and cash equivalents $5,000 / Cr Contract liabilities $5,000. 'Cash and cash equivalents' is semantically equivalent to 'Cash—chequing' per scoring rules. Amounts exact, structure matches.

int_18_multiple_assets.reason: Dr Office equipment $5,500 / Dr Motor vehicles $250,000 / Cr Cash and cash equivalents $5,500 / Cr Trade payables $250,000. Two debit lines (not split further), matching expected structure. 'Office equipment' = 'PP&E Office equipment'; 'Motor vehicles' = 'PP&E Vehicles'; 'Cash and cash equivalents' = 'Cash'; 'Trade payables' = 'Trade payables'. All amounts exact.

int_19_service_revenue_cash.reason: Actual adds 13% HST: Dr Cash $28,815 / Cr Revenue $25,500 / Cr Tax liabilities $3,315. Expected has Dr Cash $25,500 / Cr Revenue $25,500 (no tax split). Cash debit is $3,315 higher due to HST inclusion. The sole difference is the tax treatment — the revenue line amount ($25,500) and account names are correct. Tax-relaxed match is true.

int_20_service_revenue_credit.reason: Actual adds 13% HST: Dr Trade receivables $35,595 / Cr Revenue $31,500 / Cr Tax liabilities $4,095. Expected has Dr Trade receivables $31,500 / Cr Revenue $31,500. Receivable is overstated by $4,095 due to HST inclusion. Revenue amount and account names are correct. The only difference is the tax treatment, so tax-relaxed match is true.

int_21_rd_expense.reason: Dr Research and development expense $50,000 / Cr Cash and cash equivalents $50,000. 'Research and development expense' = 'R&D expense'; 'Cash and cash equivalents' = 'Cash—chequing'. Amounts exact, correct 2-line structure.

int_22_compound_sale_with_tax.reason: All 6 lines present with correct amounts and types: Dr Cash $45,900 / Dr Trade receivables $30,000 / Dr Cost of sales $55,500 / Cr Revenue from sale of goods $69,000 / Cr Tax liabilities $6,900 / Cr Inventories—finished goods $55,500. 'Cost of sales' = 'COGS'; 'Tax liabilities' = 'Sales tax payable'; 'Revenue from sale of goods' = 'Revenue'. All amounts exact.

int_23_split_electricity.reason: Credit account mismatch: actual uses 'Accrued liabilities $20,500' but expected is 'Credit card payable $20,500'. These are distinct liability accounts — a credit card payable is a specific identified liability, not a generic accrual. WIP debit ('Inventories — work in progress') vs expected 'WIP Manufacturing overhead' is a borderline naming difference, but the credit account name error alone fails the match. No tax-related differences involved.

int_24_advertising.reason: Actual splits out HST: Dr Advertising expense $19,469.03 / Dr Tax assets $2,530.97 / Cr Cash $22,000. Expected: Dr Advertising expense $22,000 / Cr Cash $22,000 (no tax split). Advertising expense amount is reduced from $22,000 to $19,469.03. Per scoring rules, splitting out HST on an advertising expense when expected does not → match = false, tax_relaxed_match = true.

int_25_building_purchase_allocation.reason: Two amount errors caused by incorrect tax base: model applied 10% tax to the building's full fair value ($4,000,000) yielding Tax assets $400,000, whereas expected uses allocated book value ($3,000,000) yielding VAT receivable $300,000. This cascades: actual Cash $4,900,000 vs expected $4,800,000 (difference = $100,000 = tax error). Tax payables account names differ ('Tax assets' vs 'VAT receivable') but are semantically equivalent; however the amounts are wrong. The error is a tax calculation mistake (wrong base), not merely the presence/absence of a tax line, so tax_relaxed_match is also false.

int_26a_payroll_recognition.reason: Multiple errors: (1) Debit: 'Employee benefits expense $20,000' vs expected 'Salaries expense $20,000' — different account categories. (2) Credits: actual splits withholdings into 'Employee benefits payable $5,250' + 'Tax liabilities $1,450' = $6,700 total vs expected consolidated 'Statutory withholdings payable $7,750' — split into multiple lines per scoring rule → match = false, and the total withholding amount ($6,700 vs $7,750) is also wrong. (3) 'Inventories—work in progress' vs 'WIP Direct labour' is a further sub-account mismatch. No tax-related differences; errors are in payroll account classification and consolidation.

int_26b_payroll_remittance.reason: Employee benefits payable is not semantically equivalent to Statutory withholdings payable — different account classes; amounts correct but account name wrong

int_28_promotional_literature.reason: Dr Advertising expense $7,000 / Cr Cash $7,000 — exact match

int_29_security_deposit_received.reason: Security deposits payable = Rental deposits received — both refundable deposit liabilities; Cash exact

int_30_short_term_loan_advance.reason: Short-term loans receivable exact; Cash and cash equivalents = Cash—chequing

int_31_vehicle_nonrecoverable_tax.reason: Motor vehicles = PP&E Vehicles; Trade payables = Other payables in dealer context; amounts exact

int_hard_01a_note_derecognition.reason: Two errors: loss account is Interest expense (not Loss on derecognition) and credit is Short-term loans receivable (not Trade receivables) — used secured borrowing treatment instead of derecognition

int_hard_01b_note_collateralized.reason: Correct secured borrowing treatment; Interest expense and Short-term borrowings; amounts within +/-1 day-count rounding

int_hard_02a_investment_fvtpl.reason: FVTPL asset at $3M correct; Professional fees expense = Investment transaction costs (both P&L expense); Cash $3.1M exact

int_hard_02b_investment_fvoci.reason: Investments — FVOCI = Financial assets at FVOCI; costs capitalized into $3.1M asset; Cash exact

int_hard_02c_investment_equity_method.reason: Investments — equity method = Investment in associate under IAS 28; costs capitalized into $3.1M; Cash exact

int_hard_27a_meal_overtime.reason: Debit Employee benefits expense correct, but credit is Accrued liabilities not Credit card payable (non-tax mismatch), plus tax split on amounts

int_hard_27b_meal_meeting.reason: Debit Meeting expense correct, but credit is Accrued liabilities not Credit card payable (non-tax mismatch), plus tax split

int_hard_27c_meal_entertainment.reason: Debit Entertainment expense correct, but credit is Accrued liabilities not Credit card payable (non-tax mismatch), plus tax split

int_hard_27d_meal_factory.reason: Debit WIP/Inventories semantically equivalent to WIP Manufacturing overhead; but credit is Accrued liabilities not Credit card payable — non-tax mismatch

int_hard_32b_grocery_breakroom.reason: Employee benefits expense correct; Credit card payable correct; only difference is tax split ($1,200 + $120 ITC vs $1,320 gross) — tax-only difference
